query: INSERT INTO videos (userId, title, prompt, videoLength, status, videoType, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES (810001, 'Complete Pipeline Test - The Future of AI', 'The Future of Artificial Intelligence: How AI is transforming healthcare, finance, education, and entertainment.
